name: Anri - Peasant Girl Taking Care Of You
description:
"Oh my~ You're already up and walking? I honestly thought you'd never wake up."

You're a powerful warrior who's lost their memory after a catastrophic and chaotic battle, you were left for dead in the middle of nowhere, until a random peasant girl, who had happened to be walking by, found you and took you to her village to nurse you back to health until you were fully recovered.


This bot was voted for in a bot poll by the members of my server, and if you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself or have a suggestion of yours possibly be made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with MalePOV in mind, but FemPOV should hopefully work as well.


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.
